constraints_manifest.name: constraints_manifest
constraints_manifest.description: Generate and parse ENTITIES / AXIOMS / HYPOTHESES from the current prompt.

answer_constraints_verdict.name: answer_constraints_verdict
answer_constraints_verdict.description: Parallel answer + constraints pipeline that builds a verdict table and accepted/rejected lists.

hypothesis_verdict.name: hypothesis_verdict
hypothesis_verdict.description: Build a separate verdict table for hypothesis columns.

/save_macro(answer_constraints_table).name: /save_macro(answer_constraints_table)
/save_macro(answer_constraints_table).dsl:
@input = $config.prompt
@chat = "session"
set_text(@chat, user, @input)
set_text(@chat, assistant, "<think>\n\n</think>\n\n")
on @input -> @draft = generate(@chat, mode:continue, continue:true, temperature:0.6, max_tokens:2048)
on @input -> @constraints_raw = generate($config.prompt_constraints, worker:analyzer, input:@input, think:false, continue:true, temperature:0.2, max_tokens:1024)
on @constraints_raw -> @constraints = parse_sections(@constraints_raw, entities:"ENTITIES:", axioms:"AXIOMS:", hypotheses:"HYPOTHESES:")
on @constraints -> @answers_header = table_header(@constraints.entities, @constraints.axioms)
on @constraints -> @hyp_grid = reshape_grid(@constraints.hypotheses, cols:$config.hypothesis_cols)
on @draft, @answers_header -> append_text(@chat, assistant, @draft.answer)
on @draft, @answers_header -> append_text(@chat, assistant, "\n\n")
on @draft, @answers_header -> append_text(@chat, assistant, @answers_header.content)
on @draft, @answers_header -> append_text(@chat, assistant, "\n| 1 |")
on @draft, @answers_header -> @table = generate(@chat, mode:continue, continue:false, temperature:0.1, max_tokens:1024, stop:"\n\n\n")

answer_constraints_accept_reject.name: answer_constraints_accept_reject
answer_constraints_accept_reject.dsl:
@input = $config.prompt
@chat = "session"
set_text(@chat, user, @input)
set_text(@chat, assistant, "<think>\n\n</think>\n\n")
on @input -> @draft = generate(@chat, mode:continue, continue:true, temperature:0.6, max_tokens:2048)
on @input -> @constraints_raw = generate($config.prompt_constraints, worker:analyzer, input:@input, think:false, continue:true, temperature:0.2, max_tokens:1024)
on @constraints_raw -> @constraints = parse_sections(@constraints_raw, entities:"ENTITIES:", axioms:"AXIOMS:", hypotheses:"HYPOTHESES:")
on @constraints -> @answers_header = table_header(@constraints.entities, @constraints.axioms)
on @constraints -> @hyp_grid = reshape_grid(@constraints.hypotheses, cols:$config.hypothesis_cols)
on @draft, @answers_header -> append_text(@chat, assistant, @draft.answer)
on @draft, @answers_header -> append_text(@chat, assistant, "\n\n")
on @draft, @answers_header -> append_text(@chat, assistant, @answers_header.content)
on @draft, @answers_header -> append_text(@chat, assistant, "\n| 1 |")
on @draft, @answers_header -> @table = generate(@chat, mode:continue, continue:false, temperature:0.1, max_tokens:1024, stop:"\n\n\n")
on @table, @constraints -> @accepted = accepted_list(@table, checks:@constraints.axioms)
on @table, @constraints -> @accepted_rows = filter_rows(@table, where:all_yes, checks:@constraints.axioms)
on @table, @constraints -> @rejected = reject_reasons(@table, checks:@constraints.axioms)

constraints_manifest_tail.name: constraints_manifest_tail
constraints_manifest_tail.description: Experimental two-worker tail-chase manifest extraction: generator seeds, analyzer probes missing items, local merge/dedupe assembles the final manifest.
